lines.speaker: Tonali Warrior
lines.text: Nilsal, traveller. You walk on holy ground. Please ensure you are respectful.

lines.speaker: Tonali Warrior
lines.text: I'm sorry, traveller, but access into the Crypt of Tonali is restricted. You may not enter.

sections.title: After Defending the Crypt of Tonali during the The Final Dawn

lines.speaker: Tonali Warrior
lines.text: Nilsal, adventurer. Good work in dealing with those cultist!

lines.speaker: Tonali Warrior
lines.text: Nilsal, adventurer. I hope you are doing well?
